mapper.select: SELECT p.*, u.username, u.avatar as user_avatar FROM posts p JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE p.id = #{id}
SELECT p.*, u.username, u.avatar as user_avatar FROM posts p JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE p.status = 'approved' ORDER BY p.created_at DESC LIMIT #{page}, #{size}
SELECT p.*, u.username, u.avatar as user_avatar FROM posts p JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE FIND_IN_SET(#{tag}, p.tags) > 0 ORDER BY p.created_at DESC LIMIT #{page}, #{size}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO posts (user_id, content, resource_url, tags, like_count, comment_count, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{content}, #{resourceUrl}, #{tags}, 0, 0, 'pending', NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE posts SET like_count = like_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE posts SET like_count = GREATEST(like_count - 1, 0) WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE posts SET comment_count = comment_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE posts SET comment_count = GREATEST(comment_count - 1, 0) WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(tags, ',', numbers.n), ',', -1) AS tag, COUNT(*) AS tag_count FROM posts CROSS JOIN ( SELECT 1 n UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5 UNION SELECT 6 UNION SELECT 7 UNION SELECT 8 UNION SELECT 9 UNION SELECT 10 ) numbers WHERE tags != '' AND CHAR_LENGTH(tags) - CHAR_LENGTH(REPLACE(tags, ',', '')) >= numbers.n - 1 GROUP BY tag ORDER BY tag_count DESC LIMIT #{limit}
